INVALID_BATCH_STATUS: This batch has not passed QC and cannot be used.
ORDER_NOT_PACKED: The order is not packed and cannot be handed over.
MANIFEST_ORDER_MISSING: The manifest still has orders that have not been scanned.
ORDER_NOT_IN_MANIFEST: This order does not belong to the current handover manifest.
RETURN_ALREADY_RECEIVED: This return has already been received.
RETURN_NOT_INSPECTED: This return has not been inspected.
SHIFT_HAS_UNRESOLVED_ISSUES: The shift still has unresolved issues and cannot be closed.
QC_REQUIRED: This item requires QC before it can enter available stock.
PERMISSION_DENIED: You do not have permission to perform this action.
SESSION_EXPIRED: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
VALIDATION_DECIMAL: The value must be a valid number.
